series_metadata.series_description: The Quota Register is a computer generated report that determines the availability of liquor permits in an area by population. This information is established as permits are cancelled and issued or there is an increase in the area population. The report contains the name of the persons who have applied for a license in the area and are awaiting and opening. This report is printed each week, it is also fiched. (fna PM-226)

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Report is kept in office area fiche is received and verified ; Microform: Fiche is retained in office area research purposed
